heading: Regulations
label: 3978 Regulations
text: The Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall prescribe regulations for the implementation of this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 548 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
